n: Instance: Righting the Wrongs of Trum Dreng

steps.t: Guto is at his encampment. You should speak with Guto.
The Elder is in Lhan Tarren. You should notify Elder Riagán that Guto is arriving soon with the half-orc guest from Isengard.
The Elder looks like he wishes to speak with you. You should talk to Elder Riagán.
